crime.value: Murder of the Duke of Gandia

victim.value: Duke of Gandia, whose death was never mentioned again by his family
victim.quote: His name was not once spoken, and neither on that day nor afterwards was there ever again any mention

closed_world.value: Papal court and Vatican society in Rome
closed_world.quote: he proceeded to the Vatican, where His Holiness was sitting

red_herring.value: Marriage dissolution used as cover for the real motive of accessing D'jem's body worth 300,000 ducats
red_herring.quote: the marriage of Sforza and Lucrezia was dissolved on a pretext of nullity. Then Frederic authorised the exhumation

clue_fairness.value: The Duke of Gandia's name never being mentioned again after Caesar's return serves as an available clue
clue_fairness.quote: His name was not once spoken, and neither on that day nor afterwards was there ever again any mention

social_world.value: Papal hierarchy with Caesar becoming second in command, controlling Roman society through church power structures
social_world.quote: he became the man who was all-powerful after the pope; but when he was second in command

alibi.value: Caesar's diplomatic mission to the new king provides extended absence covering three months after the murder
alibi.quote: he returned an the 5th of September,--that is, nearly three months after the Duke of Gandia's death

media_and_audience.value: Public ceremonial reception masks private family conspiracy, with official protocols concealing the crime
media_and_audience.quote: according to custom, the cardinals and the Spanish and Venetian ambassadors were awaiting him on horseback

_meta.title: ebook alexandre dumas pere the borgias
